chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI S.M.A. No. 200 of 2017 Date Order with signature of Judge For hearing of main petition. 15.03.2018 Petitioner, legal heirs and witnesses are present in person ----------- Through the instant petition, Petitioner, Raees Ahmed s/o. Naseem Ahmed Shaikh has prayed for the grant of Succession Certificate and Letter of Administration in respect of moveable and immoveable properties/assets, mentioned in the Amended Schedule of Properties attached with the memo of petition, available at page 31, which were left by his deceased father, namely, Naseem Ahmed Shaikh s/o. Sultan Ahmed, who died on 19.01.2017at Karachi, leaving behind Ishrat Aziz, Zahida Aamir, Tahir Ahmed, Huma Iftikhar, Mansoor Ahmed, Hina Naeem and Raees Ahmed (petitioner) as his legal heirs. Original Death Certificate of deceased as well as photostat copies of Family Registration Certificate, issued by the NADRA, title documents of the immovable properties and bank statements are also filed at page 20, 21-A, 21-B and 37 to 107. All the legal heirs have filed their affidavits of no objection for the grant of Succession Certificate and Letter of Administration in favour of the petitioner. Two witnesses, namely, Laiq-ur-Rehman s/o. Razi-ur- Rehman and Choudhry Muhammad Subhan s/o. Choudhry Nazeer Ahmed have also filed their respective affidavits and affirmed that there is no other legal heir of the deceased except mentioned above. Their affidavits are also available on record. Notice of this petition was published in Daily “Jang” Karachi dated 08.02.2018; however, none has filed any objection to the grant of Succession Certificate and Letter of Administration to petitioner, as per the report submitted by the Deputy Registrar (OS) on 01.03.2018.

Their affidavits are also available on record. Notice of this petition was published in Daily “Jang” Karachi dated 08.02.2018; however, none has filed any objection to the grant of Succession Certificate and Letter of Administration to petitioner, as per the report submitted by the Deputy Registrar (OS) on 01.03.2018. Since all the legal formalities/requirements have been fulfilled, there is no impediment in grant of Succession Certificate and Letter of Administration to petitioner, therefore, the petition is allowed. The office is directed to issue Succession Certificate and Letter of Administration in respect of movable and immovable properties/assets shown in the Schedule of Properties, as per rules. J U D G E Athar Zai
